title: Learning from Home: The New Way of Study
passage:
Learning from Home

Today, many students do not go to a school building. Instead, they study at home. This is called online learning or distance education. To study online, a student only needs three basic things: a computer, a quiet room, and a fast internet connection.

There are many good things about online learning. First, students can choose their study time. They can read lessons in the morning, in the afternoon, or even at night. They do not have to wake up very early to catch a school bus. Second, they can study anywhere. They can study in their bedroom, in the living room, or at a library. Third, they can wear comfortable clothes at home, like pajamas.

However, online learning also has some problems. First, students do not see their teachers and classmates in person. They can only talk to them on a computer screen. Sometimes, they feel lonely because they do not have friends to play with during lunch breaks. Second, some students find it hard to focus. There are many distractions at home, like television, video games, or pets.

Teachers use special websites for online learning. On these websites, teachers post homework, videos, and short tests. Students watch the videos and then do their homework. When they finish, they upload their work to the website. The teacher checks the work and sends back a grade with some comments.

In the year 2020, many schools around the world closed. Millions of children had to try online learning for the first time. Some children loved it, but others wanted to go back to their real classrooms. Today, many schools use both online learning and real classroom learning. This is called blended learning. It helps students learn in the best way possible.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What does a student need to study online?

options.A: A computer, a quiet room, and internet.

questions.explanation: Paragraph 1 states: 'To study online, a student only needs three basic things: a computer, a quiet room, and a fast internet connection.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Why do some students like online learning?

options.B: They can choose their study time.
options.C: They do not have to do homework.
options.D: They can play video games during lessons.

questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'First, students can choose their study time.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Where can students study when they learn online?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'Second, they can study anywhere. They can study in their bedroom, in the living room, or at a library.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What is one problem of online learning?

options.A: Students have to wake up too early.
options.D: Students do not have any teachers.

questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'Sometimes, they feel lonely because they do not have friends to play with...'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Students can wear pajamas when they study at home.

options.TRUE: If the statement agrees with the information
options.FALSE: If the statement contradicts the information
options.NOT GIVEN: If there is no information on this

questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'Third, they can wear comfortable clothes at home, like pajamas.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Teachers send grades to students on the special website.

options.TRUE: If the statement agrees with the information

questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'The teacher checks the work and sends back a grade...'

options.TRUE: If the statement agrees with the information

options.NOT GIVEN: If there is no information on this

questions.explanation: The text does not mention the cost of online learning compared to traditional school.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: All children loved online learning in the year 2020.

options.TRUE: If the statement agrees with the information
options.FALSE: If the statement contradicts the information
options.NOT GIVEN: If there is no information on this

questions.explanation: Paragraph 5 states: 'Some children loved it, but others wanted to go back to their real classrooms.' Therefore, not all children loved it.

questions.instruction: Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: At home, there are many distractions like television, video games, or ______.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'There are many distractions at home, like television, video games, or pets.'

questions.instruction: Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Teachers use special ______ to post homework, videos, and short tests.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'Teachers use special websites for online learning. On these websites, teachers post...'

questions.instruction: Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: When schools use both online learning and real classroom learning, it is called ______.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 5 states: 'Today, many schools use both online learning and real classroom learning. This is called blended learning.'

vocabulary.meaning: learning from home using computers and the internet
things that stop you from focusing on study or work
to send a file or document from your computer to a website
a mix of studying online and in a real classroom

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài (A1-A2)

1. Tìm từ khóa chính xác: Ở trình độ này, các từ khóa trong câu hỏi xuất hiện gần như giống hệt trong bài đọc (ví dụ: 'pajamas', 'pets', 'distractions'). Hãy tìm những từ này để xác định nhanh đoạn chứa câu trả lời.

2. Chú ý giới hạn từ: Với dạng bài điền từ, hãy đọc kỹ yêu cầu số lượng từ (NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS). Chỉ lấy đúng từ từ bài đọc, không tự ý thay đổi dạng từ (thêm/bớt 's'...).
